# JSG Liquidators

> Colorado's trusted estate sale, estate liquidation, and junk removal company serving Denver and the Front Range.

JSG Liquidators is a professional estate liquidation company based in the Denver, Colorado metro area. Founded by David Billera and Vincent, the company helps families, executors, and businesses convert estate assets into cash through online auctions, e-commerce consignment, and full-service cleanouts — with no upfront costs.

## What We Do

- **Estate Sale Auctions**: Online-only estate auctions through LiveAuctioneers and Denver Online Auctions, reaching thousands of buyers nationwide. Items typically sell within 7–10 days.
- **E-Commerce Consignment**: We list valuable antiques, collectibles, and specialty items on eBay, Etsy, and specialty marketplaces. We handle photography, listing, shipping, and customer service.
- **Business Liquidation**: Complete commercial asset recovery for businesses closing, relocating, or downsizing in Denver and Colorado. Covers office furniture, restaurant equipment, industrial machinery, and retail fixtures.
- **Estate Cleanout**: Full property clearing services — sorting, donation coordination, responsible disposal, and broom-clean delivery. We identify valuable items during cleanout to auction and offset your costs.
- **Junk Removal**: Eco-friendly junk removal with auction revenue recovery. Unlike standard haulers, we identify sellable items and auction them — often covering your removal costs entirely.

## Who We Serve

- Families managing a loved one's estate after a passing
- Executors and attorneys handling probate estates
- Homeowners downsizing or relocating in Colorado
- Businesses closing or liquidating commercial assets
- Real estate agents needing property cleared before listing

## Service Area

Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Highlands Ranch, Castle Rock, Englewood, Littleton, Thornton, Westminster, Arvada, Centennial, Boulder, Fort Collins, Colorado Springs, and surrounding Colorado communities.

## Key Differentiators

- No upfront fees — auction proceeds can offset or cover service costs entirely
- Online-only auction format reaches national buyer pools, not just local foot traffic
- AI-assisted cataloging and pricing for faster, more accurate valuations
- Compassionate, family-focused service during difficult life transitions
- Complete transparency with detailed sales reports and regular updates
